creator: seth+bugs@sysfu.com
text:
There is no facility under the Preferences => Account Information to change or update the email address associated with the account.

In the relevant Bugzilla help documentation, http://www.bugzilla.org/docs/4.4/en/html/userpreferences.html, this functionality should be available under the "Name and Password" section, which I believe has been renamed to "Account Information".

It would also be nice to give users the ability to remove their accounts if desired.
